key_suppliers: Diesel Song Cong One Member Limited Liability Company
supply_chain.dependencies: Single or limited number of suppliers for many components; long lead times for re-sourcing; dependence on battery raw materials (lithium, cobalt, nickel) for electric vehicle production; reliance on suppliers in less developed markets for raw materials
risks: Shortage of key components or raw materials can disrupt production; supplier financial distress; capacity constraints; limited availability of battery materials; competition for raw materials within automotive and other sectors; supplier quality issues; geopolitical restrictions on transactions with certain countries; tariffs and import/export bans; supply chain disruptions from labor issues, natural disasters, climate change effects, cybersecurity incidents

Supply chain disruptions from production constraints, supplier financial distress, capacity limitations, geopolitical tensions. Concentration of battery raw material suppliers. Risks from offtake agreements where Ford bears demand risk if EV production volumes are lower than expected. Supplier disruptions requiring component stockpiling.
